metadata.name: Reconcile AP Sub-Ledger to General Ledger

description: At month-end, an accountant needs to ensure the total of the Accounts Payable aging report ties to the AP account balance in the general ledger.

nodes.task_description: Run the Accounts Payable aging report as of the last day of the month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the report showing a total AP balance of $550,123.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the month-end balance for the Accounts Payable account from the general ledger.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the GL balance is $550,123.

nodes.task_description: Compare the two totals and confirm that they match.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the sub-ledger reconciles to the general ledger.
